summary: Completed comprehensive testing of date-based product availability system. All major features working correctly including admin product management with date availability, shop page date selector, cart functionality with pickup dates, order submission, and stats page showing orders grouped by pickup date with expandable sections.
passed_tests: Backend API health check endpoints
Admin login with correct password (bakery2024)
Product CRUD operations with date-based availability
Product creation with multiple date availability entries
Product update with date availability modifications
Get products by specific date endpoint /api/products/by-date/{date}
Order creation with pickup_date field
Order management (archive, unarchive, delete, status updates)
Stats endpoint returning orders grouped by pickup date structure
Admin Products tab - Add product with date availability (date picker + qty + max_qty)
Admin Products tab - Product table shows dates and stock for each date with calendar icons
Admin Products tab - Edit product dialog loads existing date availability
Admin Stats tab - Shows orders grouped by pickup date with expandable sections
Admin Stats tab - Stats cards display total revenue, orders, completed, pending counts
Admin Stats tab - Click to expand date section and see order details
Admin Stats tab - Edit button on each order in stats view opens edit dialog
Admin Orders tab - Orders displayed grouped by pickup date
Admin Orders tab - Edit order dialog updates customer info and status
Shop Page - Date selector dropdown shows available dates
Shop Page - Products filter by selected date and show correct quantities
Shop Page - Add to cart respects date-specific quantities
Shop Page - Cart displays pickup date for items
Order submission with pickup_date field creates order successfully
Product quantities update correctly after order placement
Complete order flow from product selection to order confirmation

success_percentage.backend: 100% (26/26 API tests passed including date-based availability functionality)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components working - date selector, product filtering, cart with pickup dates, admin date management, stats with expandable date sections)
